Swapped HT Cables fault persisted. 
Removed PM Box. 
Installed Eros stock PM Box. 
Fault resolved.
Calibrated sorter.
Tracer test conducted.
Observed while production was running.

data.notes:
Resoldered CH 4 HT Cable back onto the connector.

2. Replaced Complete HMI, Single board failure, CPU card failure. A loan unit was installed whilst the replacement HMI will be populated and configured.

3.New Analising software was installed on laptop on site. This software has been tested and operators trained on how it works.

4.EVE sorter was serviced, Pmt cable was broken off and repaired.
5. Machine was calibrated to speck at 200mV peaks.
5. Machine had excessive dry mud inside I did ask the operator to increase wash water on prep screen to avoid blinding in EVE
data.spares: Complete HMI, 36 x 20mm tracers, rs 458 converter, 10meters screened wire.
